phase_gate.reason: End-to-end Form-native model load plus Metal inference from the c-bootstrap/fkwu form-cli app is not yet proven.

request: Reject HTTP/Ollama proxy and ensure the path is Form-native: Form loads the model and does inference through the native Metal path.

must_not_use: MLX serving as the inference runtime
must_use: c-bootstrap/fkwu form-cli app as the control surface
Form-owned GGUF or equivalent weight loading/dequant
Form-emitted Metal kernels for llama inference
direct native carrier boundary with no Go/Rust/Python/shell/clang dependency at runtime

closed_this_turn.boundary: byte-loaded model weights into Metal runtime
closed_this_turn.status: closed for a small matvec fixture

missing_bridges.gap: fkwu form-cli real model weight loading
missing_bridges.detail: A standalone Metal runtime now loads a small binary weight file at runtime. The current fkwu form-cli app still has an HTTP/socket ask lane and does not directly open a real GGUF model file or materialize content-addressed tensor cells into the Llama runtime.
Metal audits use Form-emitted MSL plus Swift/Metal host carriers. The standalone fkwu form-cli app does not yet own the Metal device, pipeline, buffer, dispatch, and readback loop.

missing_bridges.gap: real GGUF to full generation loop
missing_bridges.detail: The repo proves Q4_K dequant and real-weight matvec separately, and proves fixture-sized Metal decode stacks. It does not yet prove tokenize prompt -> real GGUF tensor load/dequant -> full-width 28-layer GQA decode -> logits/argmax -> decoded token without Ollama.

rejected_previous_proof.reason: The user clarified that HTTP to Ollama is not the desired path. That proof remains useful only as a proxy/oracle transport receipt, not as Form-native model inference.
